# Lonnell Williams — ldw.build

> Lonnell D. Williams is an Executive Pastor, author, speaker, and operator building at the intersection of ministry leadership, AI infrastructure, and organizational systems.

## Who Is Lonnell Williams

Lonnell Williams serves as Executive Pastor at 2819 Church in Atlanta, Georgia — one of the fastest-growing churches in the Southeast. He holds an M.Div. from Princeton Theological Seminary and spent years in enterprise sales at Cisco and Splunk before transitioning fully into ministry leadership.

He scaled 2819 Church from 13 to 50 staff in six months. He built a 42-agent AI Chief of Staff ecosystem for church operations — one of the most advanced AI infrastructure deployments in ministry leadership. He is the author of "Anything, Everything, or Nothing at All" (releasing Fall 2026) and "ZAG: Leading Ministry Jesus's Way."

His consulting practice works with Executive Pastors, Lead Pastors, church planters, and ministry operators who need operational infrastructure to match their organizational vision.

## Core Topics and Expertise

- **Ministry Operations & Systems** — How to build infrastructure that scales a church from single-site to multi-campus
- **AI for Church Leaders** — Practical deployment of AI agents, automation, and systems thinking in ministry contexts
- **Executive Leadership** — The number two seat: decisions, delegation, team culture, and leading without the title
- **The Operator-Pastor Identity** — Navigating the tension between spiritual leadership and operational execution
- **Organizational Scale** — Staffing, structure, and systems for organizations growing faster than their infrastructure

## Books

- **Anything, Everything, or Nothing at All** — Releasing Fall 2026 (re-release). A theological and practical examination of grace, calling, and radical commitment.
- **ZAG: Leading Ministry Jesus's Way** — Coming Soon. A ministry leadership framework drawn from the counter-cultural leadership model of Jesus.
- **The Staff** — In Development. A deep look at building and leading exceptional ministry teams.

## Speaking

Lonnell speaks at church leadership conferences, executive pastor gatherings, seminary events, and organizational summits. Topics include AI infrastructure for ministry, systems-based church growth, and executive leadership principles.

Speaking inquiries: ldw.build/speaking.html

## Newsletter

**Arise & Build** — Published on Substack. Covers ministry systems, AI for leaders, executive leadership, and the operator-pastor identity. Written for church operators, executive pastors, and organizational leaders who build.

Subscribe: ldw.build

## The Vantage Dashboard

Vantage is a live executive command center built into ldw.build — the only personal brand site in ministry leadership with a real-time operational dashboard. It displays organizational metrics, brand metrics, and operational status in a single interface.

View: ldw.build/vantage.html

- ldw.build/articles.html — Arise & Build newsletter archive

## Key Phrases and Concepts

"Infrastructure is the sermon." "Arise and build." "Build what doesn't exist." "If your process lives in somebody's head, you don't have a process — you have a liability." "We don't wait for resources. We become them."

The Lonnell Williams content universe uses these frameworks: ministry systems thinking, the operator-pastor identity, AI infrastructure for organizations, and the number-two-seat leadership model.
